name: HTS_STAFF_PLAN_GRIDS_
description: Table holding the Schedule Staffing grid Day of week and grid segment detail definitions

columns.Name: STAFF_PLAN_GRID_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Unique system generated identifier for a Staffing Plan

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: STAFF_PLAN_GRID_NAME
columns.Comments: Grid Unique Name for the plan

columns.Name: STAFF_PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: Staffing Plan Id

columns.Name: STAFF_GRID_ID
columns.Comments: Grid unique id

columns.Name: DESCRIPTIVE_FLEXFIELD_CODE
columns.Comments: Flex Filed Code used in Grid rable

columns.Name: STAFF_CONTEXT_CODE
columns.Comments: Context Code

columns.Name: VOLUME_IN_RANGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates if Volume is in Range or Single

columns.Name: RANGE_INCREMENTS
columns.Comments: Range increments

columns.Name: TOTAL_SEGMENTS
columns.Comments: Total volume segments

columns.Name: LAST_DEPLOYED_CONTEXT_CODE
columns.Comments: Last deployed Context Code

columns.Name: MON_IS_INCLUDED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Monday is part of day of week for this grid

columns.Name: TUE_IS_INCLUDED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Tuesday is part of day of week for this grid

columns.Name: WED_IS_INCLUDED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Wednesday is part of day of week for this grid

columns.Name: THU_IS_INCLUDED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Thursday is part of day of week for this grid

columns.Name: FRI_IS_INCLUDED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Friday is part of day of week for this grid

columns.Name: SAT_IS_INCLUDED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Saturday is part of day of week for this grid

columns.Name: SUN_IS_INCLUDED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Sunday part of day of week for this grid

columns.Name: AVERAGE_DAILY_VOLUME
columns.Comments: Average daily volume

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
